ddls:
CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Hashed password of the user */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the user */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the user */,
  "is_verified" INTEGER /* Indicates if the user's email has been verified */,
  "verification_token" TEXT /* Token used for email verification */,
  "verification_expires" TEXT /* Expiration date for the verification token */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp for the user's last login */,
  "is_admin" INTEGER /* Indicates if the user is an admin */,
  "account_status" TEXT /* User account status (active, suspended, etc.) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "signup_attempts" (
  "attempt_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each signup attempt */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user attempting to sign up */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the signup attempt */,
  "status" TEXT /* Result of the signup attempt (success or failure) */,
  "error_message" TEXT /* Error message if the signup failed */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the signup attempt was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used for the signup attempt */,
  "captcha_token" TEXT /* Token used for CAPTCHA verification */,
  "captcha_result" TEXT /* Result of the CAPTCHA verification (success or failure) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("attempt_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_signup_attempts_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "validation_rules" (
  "rule_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each validation rule */,
  "rule_description" TEXT /* Description of the validation rule */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the rule is currently active */,
  "rule_type" TEXT /* Type of validation rule (e.g., email, password, name) */,
  "rule_pattern" TEXT /* Regular expression pattern for the validation rule */,
  "rule_message" TEXT /* Custom error message for the validation rule */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rule_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "error_messages" (
  "error_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each error message */,
  "error_code" TEXT /* Code associated with the error */,
  "error_message" TEXT /* Message displayed to the user when this error occurs */,
  "error_severity" TEXT /* Severity level of the error (e.g., info, warning, error) */,
  "error_category" TEXT /* Category of the error (e.g., input, system) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("error_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "signup_tests" (
  "test_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each test case */,
  "test_name" TEXT /* Name of the test case */,
  "test_description" TEXT /* Description of the test case */,
  "test_type" TEXT /* Type of test (e.g., unit, integration) */,
  "test_environment" TEXT /* Environment in which the test was run (e.g., development, production) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("test_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "test_results" (
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each test result */,
  "test_id" INTEGER /* ID of the test case */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user involved in the test case */,
  "result" TEXT /* Result of the test case (pass or fail) */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp when the result was recorded */,
  "test_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the test in seconds */,
  "test_environment" TEXT /* Environment in which the test was run (e.g., development, production) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_results_test_id FOREIGN KEY ("test_id") REFERENCES signup_tests ("test_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_results_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "admin_users" (
  "admin_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each admin user */,
  "admin_name" TEXT /* Name of the admin user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the admin user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the admin user (e.g., superadmin, moderator) */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp for the admin user's last login */,
  "is_superadmin" INTEGER /* Indicates if the admin user is a superadmin */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("admin_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_feedback" (
  "feedback_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each feedback entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user providing feedback */,
  "feedback_text" TEXT /* Text of the feedback */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp when the feedback was provided */,
  "feedback_rating" INTEGER /* Rating given by the user for the signup process (e.g., 1 to 5) */,
  "feedback_category" TEXT /* Category of the feedback (e.g., usability, security) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feedback_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_feedback_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
